title: [HF13/S13] Terracotta half pots with saucers (pack of 10) 13.5 cm diameter x 7.5cm high
features: Traditional style terracotta half plant pot, sold in a pack of 10
With drainage hole in base of pot
Saucer is approx 13cm dia (external top) [saucer is not a suitable size to use with pot upside down as an ashtray - search instead for 'halfpot ashtray']
Numerous uses from gardening to craft projects
description: Product Description Quality 'from the manufacturer' The Westerwald region of Germany is home to ceramic clays with worldwide unique properties, this is the start point of the exceptional quality of our products as we obtain our raw materials from local quarries. Our products are constantly monitored and reviewed during the production process according to our quality management. Our aim is to deliver only first class quality. Only then is our product fit for the transport to our customers. With improving product quality and on demand availability of our products we have earned our good reputation. 'from the manufacturer' We use the energy and raw material resources for our production efficiently and economically. The “certificated energy management”, in effect since 2013, allows to systematically find solutions and opportunities to keep inevitable losses at an absolute minimum, to reuse residual energies efficiently and to find the optimum use of energy. The change of our energy source in 2011 allowed a significant reduction of the specific CO2 emissions. Our kilns are equipped with efficient exhaust gas filters. They eliminate contaminant substances far below the threshold value demanded by law. Except for the reaction product from the exhaust gas treatment, no waste materials occur in our production. All mass flows within the value added chain are being reused. This preserves the depository capacities and relieves the environment. Production breakage is being sorted and micro-milled returned to the material flow. This recycling enables to preserve the natural raw material resources. Why Buy from us Packaging Our cardboard is made from recycled materials and is fully recyclable. Our cardboard manufacturer holds environmental management certificates to ISO14001:2015 certified by the British Standards Institution dated 19/05/2023. A name you can Trust Weston Mill is a brand of Henry Watson's Potteries, a 7th generation family business whom have been operating in the UK since 1800. Reduced carbon footprint Sourced from within Europe, this product has a lower carbon footprint than those sourced from the far east. Quick Response If you have any queries we'll be sure to get back to you asap 7 days a week.
